title: LLM Personal Wiki
description: Your AI conversations compile themselves into a searchable knowledge base. Claude Code hooks capture every session and extract decisions, patterns, and lessons into cross-referenced markdown articles.
benefits: Zero-effort capture via SessionEnd and PreCompact hooks
Index-guided retrieval beats RAG at personal scale — no vector DB needed
Shared memory across Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI
stack: Claude · Python · Claude Agent SDK · Obsidian
